ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or firm */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the client */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., individual, institution) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the client was registered */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Client's risk tolerance level */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Current status of the client's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the trade */,
  "deal_type" TEXT /* Type of the deal (e.g., Block) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., Purchase, Sell) */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price of the securities traded */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of securities traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument traded */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker who executed the trade */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission fees for the trade */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was settled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_deal_type FOREIGN KEY ("deal_type") REFERENCES deal_types ("deal_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_action FOREIGN KEY ("action") REFERENCES actions ("action_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., BSE, NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deal_types" (
  "deal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deal type */,
  "deal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the deal type (e.g., Block) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deal type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the deal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., Purchase, Sell) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each action type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade log entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the trade */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., trader, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high volume) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was raised */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)
